methods.name: wallet_supportedWalletApi
methods.summary: Returns a list of wallet api versions compatible with the wallet. Notice this might be different from Starknet JSON-RPC spec
methods.description: When wallet is locked, return values. When Dapp is not approved, return values. When wallet is connected and unlocked, return values.

result.name: result
result.description: The full semver of the latest wallet API version supported by the wallet, and any past supported versions.

methods.name: wallet_supportedSpecs
methods.summary: Returns a list of rpc spec versions compatible with the wallet
methods.description: When wallet is locked, return values. When Dapp is not approved, return values. When wallet is connected and unlocked, return values.

result.name: result
result.description: Semver of Starknet's JSON-RPC supported by the wallet

methods.name: wallet_getPermissions
methods.summary: Get the existing permissions for the Dapp from the wallet
methods.description: When wallet is locked, return empty array. When Dapp is not approved, return empty array. When wallet is connected and unlocked, return values.

methods.name: wallet_requestAccounts
methods.summary: Get the account addresses of the wallet active account
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, return values.

params.name: silent_mode
params.summary: If true, the wallet will not show the wallet-unlock UI in case of a locked wallet, nor the Dapp-approve UI in case of a non-allowed Dapp, and will return an empty array

result.name: result
result.description: The active account of the wallet

methods.name: wallet_requestChainId
methods.description: When wallet is locked, return values. When Dapp is not approved, return values. When wallet is connected and unlocked, return values.

methods.name: wallet_deploymentData
methods.summary: Request from the current wallet the data required to deploy the account at the current address
methods.description: When wallet is locked, return error DEPLOYMENT_DATA_NOT_AVAILABLE. When Dapp is not approved, return error DEPLOYMENT_DATA_NOT_AVAILABLE. When wallet is connected and unlocked, return values.

methods.name: wallet_switchStarknetChain
methods.summary: Change the current network of the wallet, a permission request will be displayed on the wallet UI.
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, display switch-chain UI.

params.name: silent_mode
params.summary: If true, the wallet will not show the wallet-unlock UI in case of a locked wallet, nor the Dapp-approve UI in case of a non-allowed Dapp, and will return an error CHAIN_ID_NOT_SUPPORTED

result.name: response
result.summary: If wallet agrees to change network, return true. If the current network is selected, return true. If network is not added to wallet, return false

methods.name: wallet_watchAsset
methods.summary: Add a token in the list of assets displayed by the wallet, the wallet will show an approval UI
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, display watch-asset UI.

result.name: response
result.summary: If adding a token is agreed, or if token is already displayed, return true

methods.name: wallet_addStarknetChain
methods.summary: Add a new network in the list of networks of the wallet, a permission request will be displayed on the wallet UI.
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, display add-chain UI.

params.name: Starknet Chain to add
params.description: Information for the chain to add to the wallet

result.name: response
result.summary: If user agreed, and network added successfully, or if network already listed, return true

methods.name: wallet_addInvokeTransaction
methods.summary: Submit a new transaction to be added to the chain
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, display invoke-tx UI. To submit a STRK20 transaction prepared by wallet_strk20PrepareInvoke, pass the prepared call as the single entry of 'invoke_transaction' and the prepared proof material via 'proof'.

params.name: invoke_transaction
params.description: A list of calls to invoke in an invoke transaction

params.name: proof
params.description: Zero-knowledge proof material to attach to the transaction. Required when submitting a STRK20 call produced by wallet_strk20PrepareInvoke; omitted for regular invocations.

result.name: result
result.description: The result of the transaction submission

methods.name: wallet_addDeclareTransaction
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, display declare-tx UI.

params.name: declare_transaction
params.description: The information needed to declare a new class

result.name: result
result.description: The result of the transaction submission

transaction_hash.title: The hash of the declare transaction

class_hash.title: The hash of the declared class

methods.name: wallet_strk20InvokeTransaction
methods.summary: Submit a transaction containing STRK20 privacy protocol actions
methods.description: Submits one or more STRK20 actions (deposit, withdraw, private transfer) as a single transaction. The wallet displays an approval UI and may take significantly longer than wallet_addInvokeTransaction because zero-knowledge proof generation is required. The dapp must tolerate long-running calls. Registration into the privacy pool is handled transparently by the wallet — if the user is not registered, NOT_REGISTERED is returned. If the number of open notes filled by invoke actions does not match the number of open notes created by transfer actions with "OPEN" as the amount, INVALID_REQUEST_PAYLOAD is returned.

params.name: actions
params.description: An ordered list of STRK20 actions to execute atomically

result.name: result
result.description: The result of the transaction submission

methods.name: wallet_strk20PrepareInvoke
methods.summary: Build the Starknet call (and zero-knowledge proof) for a STRK20 transaction without submitting it
methods.description: Builds the Starknet call that wallet_strk20InvokeTransaction would submit, plus its zero-knowledge proof, but does not send the transaction to the network. The dapp is responsible for submitting the returned call itself. The wallet supplies the viewing key and the user's private state (channels, notes) — the dapp only describes the actions. When 'simulate' is true the wallet returns the call with an empty proof: it skips the (expensive, state-revealing) proof-generation step, but the returned call is otherwise the same shape as the non-simulated one. Simulate mode is intended for fee estimation and UI previews; the returned call cannot be submitted on-chain. As with wallet_strk20InvokeTransaction the wallet may take significantly longer than wallet_addInvokeTransaction when simulate is false, because proof generation is required, and the dapp must tolerate long-running calls. Registration into the privacy pool is handled transparently by the wallet — if the user is not registered, NOT_REGISTERED is returned. If the number of open notes filled by invoke actions does not match the number of open notes created by transfer actions with "OPEN" as the amount, INVALID_REQUEST_PAYLOAD is returned.

params.name: actions
params.description: An ordered list of STRK20 actions to bundle into the prepared call

params.name: simulate
params.description: If true, skip zero-knowledge proof generation and return an empty proof. Use for fee estimation or UI previews; the returned call is not submittable on-chain. Defaults to false.

result.name: result
result.description: The Starknet call that materializes the requested STRK20 actions and its accompanying zero-knowledge proof. When 'simulate' was true, the 'proof' fields are present but empty.

methods.name: wallet_strk20Balances
methods.summary: Query the user's private balances for a list of tokens, or for all shielded tokens
methods.description: Returns the private balance held inside the STRK20 privacy pool for each of the requested token addresses. If an empty array is passed, returns the balances of all shielded tokens the wallet holds in the privacy pool. If the user is not registered in the pool, returns NOT_REGISTERED.

params.name: tokens
params.description: The token addresses to query balances for. An empty array returns the balances of all shielded tokens

result.name: result
result.description: Private balances, one entry per requested token, in the same order as the input. When an empty array is passed, one entry per shielded token held in the privacy pool

methods.name: wallet_signTypedData
methods.summary: Sign typed data using the wallet
methods.description: When wallet is locked, open wallet-unlock UI. When Dapp is not approved, display Dapp-approve UI. When wallet is connected and unlocked, display sign-typed-data UI.

result.name: response
result.summary: The signature over the typed data

PADDED_TXN_HASH.title: Padded Transaction Hash
PADDED_TXN_HASH.description: The transaction hash, as assigned in Starknet, padded to 64 hex digits

SPEC_VERSION.title: Starknet Spec Version
SPEC_VERSION.description: A Starknet JSON-RPC spec version, following semantic versioning.

API_VERSION.title: Wallet API version
API_VERSION.description: A wallet API version, following semantic versioning. When used as a request parameter and not specified, the latest is assumed.

ASSET.title: Starknet Token
ASSET.description: Details of an onchain Starknet ERC20 token

CHAIN_ID.title: Chain id
CHAIN_ID.description: Starknet chain id, given in hex representation.

ACCOUNT_DEPLOYMENT_DATA.title: Account Deployment Data
ACCOUNT_DEPLOYMENT_DATA.description: Data required to deploy an account at and address

address.title: Address
address.description: The expected address to be deployed, used to double check

class_hash.title: Class hash
class_hash.description: The hash of the deployed contract's class

salt.title: Class hash
salt.description: The hash of the deployed contract's class

calldata.description: The parameters passed to the constructor
calldata.title: Constructor calldata

sigdata.title: Signature Data
sigdata.description: Optional array of felts to be added to the signature

version.title: Contract Version
version.description: The Cairo version of the contract 0 or 1

INVOKE_CALL.title: Invoke transaction
INVOKE_CALL.description: initiates a transaction from a given account

contract_address.title: The contract address to interact with

entry_point.title: Contract entry point
entry_point.description: A string correlating the selector name of the contract, e.g. 'transfer'

calldata.title: calldata
calldata.description: Calldata to be passed to the entry point

compiled_class_hash.title: Compiled class hash
compiled_class_hash.description: The hash of the Cairo assembly resulting from the Sierra compilation

class_hash.title: Class hash
class_hash.description: The hash of the declared class

STARKNET_TYPE.title: Starknet Type
STARKNET_TYPE.description: A single type, as part of a struct. The `type` field can be any of the EIP-712 supported types

types.description: Defines the types of the typed data object

primaryType.description: primaryType represents the top-level type of the object in the message

domain.description: The EIP712 domain struct. Any of these fields are optional, but it must contain at least one field

STRK20_ACTION.title: STRK20 Action
STRK20_ACTION.description: A single action to perform via the STRK20 privacy protocol. The 'type' field discriminates the variant.

STRK20_DEPOSIT_ACTION.title: STRK20 Deposit Action
STRK20_DEPOSIT_ACTION.description: Deposits public funds from the user's account into the privacy pool. Always to self.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount of the token, in its smallest unit

STRK20_WITHDRAW_ACTION.title: STRK20 Withdraw Action
STRK20_WITHDRAW_ACTION.description: Withdraws funds from the privacy pool to a public recipient address.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount of the token, in its smallest unit

recipient.title: Recipient Address
recipient.description: The public Starknet address that receives the withdrawn funds

STRK20_TRANSFER_ACTION.title: STRK20 Transfer Action
STRK20_TRANSFER_ACTION.description: Privately transfers funds inside the privacy pool to another registered user. When amount is "OPEN", creates an open note instead of transferring a fixed amount (see the amount field).

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount of the token, in its smallest unit, or the literal string "OPEN" to create a new open note

recipient.title: Recipient Address
recipient.description: The Starknet address of the registered recipient inside the privacy pool

STRK20_INVOKE_ACTION.title: STRK20 Invoke Action
STRK20_INVOKE_ACTION.description: Invokes an arbitrary contract as part of the same STRK20 transaction. Calldata items may be literal felts or wallet-resolved placeholders that the wallet substitutes during action assembly: ${openNoteIds[N]} for the Nth opened note ID, or ${poolAddress} for the privacy pool address.

STRK20_CALLDATA_ITEM.title: STRK20 Invoke Calldata Item
STRK20_CALLDATA_ITEM.description: A single calldata entry: either a literal felt, or one of the placeholder strings the wallet expands during action assembly.

STRK20_CALLDATA_PLACEHOLDER.title: STRK20 Calldata Placeholder
STRK20_CALLDATA_PLACEHOLDER.description: A wallet-resolved placeholder that the wallet substitutes with a single felt during action assembly. ${openNoteIds[N]} expands to the ID of the Nth open note in the same transaction (i.e. the Nth transfer action with amount "OPEN"); ${poolAddress} expands to the privacy pool contract address. N is a zero-based index.

STRK20_BALANCE_ENTRY.title: STRK20 Balance Entry
STRK20_BALANCE_ENTRY.description: A private balance for a single token held inside the privacy pool

balance.title: Balance
balance.description: The private balance of the token, in its smallest unit

STRK20_CALL_AND_PROOF.title: STRK20 Call And Proof
STRK20_CALL_AND_PROOF.description: A Starknet call that materializes a STRK20 transaction, together with the zero-knowledge proof needed to submit it. When this was produced in simulate mode the 'proof' fields are present but empty (proof.data is an empty string, proof.output and proof.proof_facts are empty arrays); in that case the call is not submittable on-chain and is only useful for fee estimation or UI previews.

call.title: Call
call.description: The Starknet call to submit (typically targeting the privacy pool contract)

STRK20_PROOF.title: STRK20 Proof
STRK20_PROOF.description: Zero-knowledge proof material that must be included with the call when submitting the STRK20 transaction on-chain. When the prepared call was built in simulate mode all three fields are present but empty.

data.title: Proof Data
data.description: The serialized proof. Empty string in simulate mode.

output.title: L2-to-L1 Message Payload
output.description: L2-to-L1 message payload: [class_hash, ...serialized_server_actions]. Empty array in simulate mode.

proof_facts.title: Proof Facts
proof_facts.description: Proof facts emitted by the proving service; must be included with the transaction when submitting to the chain. Empty array in simulate mode.

PADDED_FELT.title: Padded felt
PADDED_FELT.description: A padded felt represented as 62 hex digits, 3 bits, and 5 leading zero bits.

USER_REFUSED_OP.description: The user refused the operation in the wallet

DEPLOYMENT_DATA_NOT_AVAILABLE.description: The deployment data is not available or no supported

CHAIN_ID_NOT_SUPPORTED.description: The requested chain ID is not supported by the wallet

NOT_REGISTERED.description: The user is not registered in the STRK20 privacy pool

INSUFFICIENT_PRIVATE_BALANCE.description: The user does not have enough private balance to cover the requested withdraw or transfer

PRIVACY_LEAK.description: The wallet detected that completing the operation may compromise the user's privacy
